name: Inyo
description: Private AI operating system for modern family offices. 13 specialized agents covering deal flow, portfolio monitoring, legal, tax, CFO, concierge, philanthropy, and relationship intelligence.

agents.name: Deal Flow Analyst
agents.description: Scores and triages inbound investment opportunities for family offices. Returns structured analysis with risks, opportunities, and a 0-100 deal score.

context.description: Vertical LLM for enterprise compliance teams. $8.4M ARR, 3.2x growth YoY.

agents.name: IC Memo Writer
agents.description: Generates institutional-quality investment committee memos with SWOT analysis, financials, team assessment, and recommendation.

samplePrompt.label: Generate IC memo for Series B deal

context.team: Sarah Chen CEO (ex-Palantir), Marcus Webb CTO (ex-Two Sigma)

agents.name: Portfolio Monitor
agents.description: Watches existing investments for material changes: funding events, executive departures, burn rate changes, press coverage, and legal issues.

agents.name: CFO Agent
agents.description: Analyzes entity-level cash flows, liquidity positions, payables, and capital call schedules for a family office.

context.query: What is our current liquidity position?

agents.name: Legal Review Agent
agents.description: Reviews legal documents (SAFEs, NDAs, LP agreements, term sheets) for risk flags, unusual clauses, and compliance issues. Legal spotting only — not legal advice.

samplePrompt.label: Review SAFE note for risk flags

context.documentContent: SAFE Note — $12M at $85M pre-money cap with MFN and pro-rata rights...

agents.name: Tax Intelligence Agent
agents.description: Organizes K-1 income, tracks filing deadlines, estimates tax liabilities, and surfaces deduction opportunities for multi-entity family offices.

context.query: What is my estimated 2025 federal tax liability?

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.description: Handles operational requests: travel coordination, meeting prep, follow-up tracking, gift reminders, and task delegation.

context.request: Arrange Aspen trip for 6 guests, weekend of June 14-16

agents.name: Concierge Agent
agents.description: Manages household and lifestyle operations: travel bookings, property maintenance, vendor coordination, and reservations.

context.request: Book Nobu Malibu for 4 this Saturday at 8pm

agents.name: Philanthropy Agent
agents.description: Supports foundation and giving operations: grant tracking, impact reporting, pledge reminders, and DAF strategy.

context.query: What has been our foundation impact this year?

agents.name: Relationship Intelligence
agents.description: Maps network graph, finds warm introduction paths, tracks interaction history, and surfaces relationship insights.

samplePrompt.label: Find warm path to Andreessen Horowitz

context.query: Who do I know at Andreessen Horowitz?

agents.name: Deal Enrichment Analyst
agents.description: Scores deals using web signals, LinkedIn founder profiles, and Crunchbase funding history. Returns affinity, risk, and fundability scores.

samplePrompt.label: Enrich seed deal with web signals

agents.name: Term Sheet Analyst
agents.description: Extracts and compares investment term sheets. Flags non-standard terms, liquidation preferences, anti-dilution, and board composition.

samplePrompt.label: Extract terms from Series B term sheet

documents.name: Meridian AI Series B Term Sheet
documents.content: Pre-money valuation: $85M. Investment: $12M. Liquidation preference: 1x non-participating...

agents.name: Diligence Agent
agents.description: Reviews deal diligence checklists with AI analysis. Flags gaps, confirms findings, and surfaces red flags.

samplePrompt.label: Run diligence checklist on Series B deal
